'''''D-89''''' was a [[New Republic Intelligence Service|New Republic Intelligence]] [[Ferret-class reconnaissance vessel|''Ferret''-class reconnaissance vessel]]. Assigned to [[Colonel/Legends|Colonel]] [[Ejagga Pakkpekatt|Pakkpekkat's]] ''[[Teljkon Vagabond]]'' task force, ''D-89'' was used to trail the ''Vagabond'' while an interdiction line was established. Once in place, ''D-89'' was pushed within the twelve-[[Kilometer/Legends|kilometer]] safe-zone. After [[Lady Luck/Legends|''Lady Luck'']] was allowed to land on the ''Vagabond'' by providing [[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO's]] code, ''D-89'' was sent in to use the same code. Although the code was repeated accurately, the [[Starship/Legends|vessel]] was expecting a new code, and destroyed the ''Ferret''.

{{Ship-stub}}
